title: bitteria pilulifera
intro: Bitteria pilulifera, also known as Bitter Apple, is a plant species native to Africa and Asia, recognized by its toxic leaves and red or yellow berries. The medicinal properties of Bitteria pilulifera lie in its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Bitteria pilulifera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
